name: Infested
summary: The Infested are an organic hive threat known for swarms, mutation, and aggressive close-range pressure.
description: Major hostile faction composed of infected lifeforms and hybridized units.

recommendedStatusPlan: Prioritize area denial and status spread against clustered targets.
Delete support aura units before focusing bulk swarm damage.
cautions: Swarm pressure punishes reload-heavy and narrow single-target setups.
Support units can distort normal time-to-kill expectations.

notes: Infested guidance should emphasize crowd pressure and support-unit priority, not just raw faction weakness.
